title: Word Formation
topics: prefixes · suffixes · noun/verb/adjective formation · word families
description: Tvoření slov — předpony, přípony a konverze.

quiz.sentence: The ___ (create) of this painting took two years. (noun)
She is very ___ (depend) on her phone. (adj)
His ___ (manage) of the project was excellent. (noun)
We need to ___ (consider) our strategy. (do again)
She is ___ (employ) — she runs her own business. (adj)
The film was completely ___ (predict) — I knew the ending. (adj, negative)

tasks: 1. For each suffix, create 3 new words not in the examples
2. Build a word family for: nation, develop, employ, succeed
3. Write a paragraph using at least 10 words formed with prefixes/suffixes
